name: My Boss Calls Me My Love
original_name: สูตรเล่ห์ เสน่หา
overview: The story of hemp cotton A young girl from upcountry who is skilled at making chicken stir-fried with basil. But then her life had to be turned into a fictitious housewife for Anawat's house. The handsome man in the future CEO Anawat wondered about the origin of Por Fai while she was not destined to him either. When necessity leads them both to be closer together. A chaos with recipes and tricks involved. So both of them fall in love with each other without realizing it...

trailers.title: [Trailer2] สูตรเล่ห์เสน่หา เริ่ม 1 พฤศจิกายน ทาง #ช่อง8
